channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: ✨ Added a 🎵 Track ID music recognition tool in my fully vibecoded new Chrome extension 🚀 SuperLevels...
item.description:
✨ Added a 🎵 Track ID music recognition tool in my fully vibecoded new Chrome extension 🚀 SuperLevels that I started a few hours ago
I never made a Chrome extension before but they were all becoming such a safety risk that I might as well re-make everything myself with AI
It works really well, even catches double drops in Drum & Bass mixes like this (well it detects at least one track here, but that's impressive!)
No messing around with Shazam anymore, it pulls the audio feed straight from inside Chrome!
It now has all these features
🎵 Track ID music recognizer 🗑️ Tab Cleaner, auto closes tabs after inactivity (with host-based exclusions) 🍪 Cookie Editor, lets you nuke all cookies or edit any 🔀 Redirect Tracer, lets you see any redirects a site took you through 🌗 Dark Mode, changes websites to dark, per site or all sites 🎚️ X Dim, changes X background back to dark blue 🗺️ Add back a Maps link to Google in EU (they hide it!) 🌠 Add back a View Image link to Google Images in EU (they hide it too!) 🍪 Cookie popup hider 📹 YouTube recommendations hider 🖍️ CSS editor 📜 JS toggler
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 4 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 626
item.author: @levelsio

item.title: In Cowork, Claude can now build live artifacts: dashboards and trackers connected to your apps and f...
item.description:
In Cowork, Claude can now build live artifacts: dashboards and trackers connected to your apps and files.
Open one any time and it refreshes with current data. https://t.co/oru97zRn8L
--- @claudeai | ❤️ 1441 | 🔁 96 | 💬 149 | 👁 52685
